name: AWS Redshift Unsuccessful Enumeration Attempt
description: Failed attempts to retrieve information about Redshift resources, such as clusters, snapshots, security groups, or subnet groups. These failures may result from insufficient permissions or an attacker probing for accessible resources. While legitimate users may encounter such failures due to misconfigured permissions, repeated or unexpected failures could indicate unauthorized reconnaissance attempts.
